title: The Talented Tenth
venue: James Pott and Company, New York

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: The Talented Tenth (1903), by W. E. B. Du Bois. From The Negro Problem.
excerpt: _ By PROF. W.E. BURGHARDT DuBOIS A strong plea for the higher education of the Negro, which those who are interested in the future of the freedmen cannot afford to ignore. Prof. DuBois produces ample evidence to prove conclusively the truth of his statement that...
